context: Saving a multi-step deployment workflow that the user wants remembered permanently

checklist.name: Uses --tier procedural
checklist.description: Uses `--tier procedural` because the content describes a step-by-step how-to process

checklist.name: Captures all key steps
checklist.description: The captured text includes all 5 deployment steps (build, tag, push ECR, update task def, wait for stabilisation)

checklist.name: Uses --text flag with content
checklist.description: Content is passed via `--text` flag (or pipe equivalent)

checklist.name: Uses relevant tags
checklist.description: Attaches tags related to deployment (e.g., `--tags deployment,ecs,docker` or similar)

checklist.name: Does not use --tier episodic
checklist.description: Does NOT use `--tier episodic` (or omit tier) for a permanent process
